title: Emerging Technologies in Last-Mile Delivery
description:
The importance of last-mile delivery is growing rapidly with the rise of e-commerce and Q-commerce. However, this crucial stage of delivery often involves significant complexities, leading to increased costs for logistics companies and at times poor customer service.

As the final leg of delivery is undergoing tech-powered transformation, we’re excited to invite you to a thought-provoking virtual session hosted by “Tirwin Talent”, where we’ll explore the evolving landscape of last-mile delivery in India and beyond.
speaker: Multiple Speakers

keyTakeaways.title: Real-world B2B challenges in last-mile logistics: billing disputes, RTOs, and urban access constraints
keyTakeaways.description: by Supply Chain & Global Sourcing leader - The Timken Company

keyTakeaways.title: Emerging trends: drones, EVs, predictive AI, and micro-fulfillment hubs
keyTakeaways.description: by Mr. Naveen Kolathur – SVP Supply Chain & Head IT – SRM Tech, Professor of practice LIBA

keyTakeaways.title: Spotlight on DIGIPIN: India Post’s new geo-coded digital address system and its role in rural reach, emergency response, and delivery precision
keyTakeaways.description: by Mr J. Krishnan - past president ACCAI & member MCCI Governing council, Advisor TIRWIN MANAGEMENT SERVICES

title: Bridging the Skill Gap & Enhancing Recruitment Strategies in the Logistics & Supply Chain Industry
description: In today's volatile economic scenario, the real worth of people's education doesn’t result in productive employment. There is an evident gap on skills between industry demand and candidate availability. There is a growing relevance to make people job ready through continuous updating of skills.
speaker: Industry Experts

keyTakeaways.title: Skill Development
keyTakeaways.description: Strategies to continuously update skills to make candidates job-ready

keyTakeaways.title: Recruitment Strategies
keyTakeaways.description: Overcoming the gap between industry demand and candidate availability
